stemHtml: In compliance with ICAO Annex 1 and under certain circumstances, a medical examination may be deferred at the discretion of the licensing authority. This is possible provided that such deferment shall only be made as an exception, and shall not exceed…

options.a: Two consecutive periods each of three months in the case of a flight crew member of an aircraft engaged in non-commercial operations.
options.b: A single period of six months in the case of a flight crew member of an aircraft engaged in non-commercial operations.
options.c: A single period of six months in the case of a flight crew member of an aircraft engaged in commercial operations.
options.d: A single period of 7 months in the case of a commerical pilot.
